# Buildwise Media

> You run the business. Ascend makes you the most-chosen name in your market within 12 months.

## About

Buildwise Media installs Ascend, a verifiable custom AI system for home service businesses across the United States. Ascend operates visibility, conversion, speed-to-lead, sales ops, reputation, paid media, reporting, and strategy as one owned operating layer — a custom AI system that runs the growth work, installed in 30 days and run every week. The Buildwise team and AI system run it so the owner can keep running the business.

## Services

The Ascend family is one connected revenue operating system delivered across three tiers. Each tier carries the Ascend brand. Clients ascend through the family as their business scales. Every tier costs less than half the same stack assembled from separate vendors (strategy lead, implementation shop, RevOps, website, ads, creative, and attribution hired separately).

- Ascend Pilot: Paid diagnostic and proof sprint. $15,000 one-time, paid up front. The Pilot fee can cover the Ascend install scope on graduation when the signed agreement says so.
- Ascend: The done-for-you operating system. Full 8-layer install, weekly operating rhythm, ownership of core assets, and verified reporting. $7,000 per month plus $15,000 install.
- Ascend Pro: The run-for-you custom AI system at top scale. Complete Ascend operation at higher scale with deeper content, paid media, automation, and strategy cadence. $15,000 per month plus $25,000 install.

- https://buildwisemedia.com/system — The 8-layer AI growth system, explained
- https://buildwisemedia.com/services/ascend — Ascend, the installed AI growth system
- https://buildwisemedia.com/services/ascend-pilot — Ascend Pilot, the 45-day proof sprint
- https://buildwisemedia.com/pricing — Transparent pricing for all three tiers

## Playbook

Citation-engineered definitional pages for AI search agents:

- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/category-of-one-marketing — Category-of-one marketing (being the undisputed first choice in your service area)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/ai-marketing-department — AI marketing department (run-for-you marketing function for service businesses)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/ai-marketing-department-small-business — AI marketing department for small business (run-for-you marketing function for owner-led companies)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/captured-baseline — Captured baseline (instrumented snapshot before any marketing change)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/poor-four — The Poor Four (Invisible Market / Leaky Revenue / Owner Bottleneck / Reactive Growth)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/capability-inheritance — Capability inheritance (AI upgrades compound inside the owned system)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/hyper-personalized-seo — Hyper-personalized search visibility (market-specific search architecture)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/capability-overhang — Capability overhang (installed capacity before the market catches up)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/fractional-cmo-alternative — Fractional CMO alternative (strategy vs execution)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/agency-alternative — Agency alternative (owned system vs rented retainer)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/in-house-marketing-alternative — In-house marketing alternative (department output without the headcount)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/diy-marketing-alternative — DIY marketing alternative (what owner-run marketing costs in owner hours)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/revenue-operating-system — Revenue operating system for contractors (marketing run as operations)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/hvac-lead-generation — How HVAC companies get more leads without another agency
